sections.heading: Tool and Skills Audit
sections.description: List every available MCP and skill, state Using or Not using with reasoning. Load schemas only after explicit user approval.

sections.heading: Task Board and Notes Check
sections.description: Ask whether to check Linear, TickTick, personal notes, or plan file before beginning work. Update files after each completed action.

sections.heading: Claude! prefix exception
sections.description: Claude! prefix skips session-start checks for that turn only. Two consecutive Claude! messages triggers mode confirmation prompt.

sections.heading: COLLABORATION PRINCIPLES
sections.description: Lead developer partnership: surface opinions, prefer simplest effective method, honesty over speed, push into difficult territory, treat time pressure as a planning constraint.

sections.heading: Diagrams
sections.description: Use Mermaid.js for all architecture and flow diagrams.

sections.heading: Precision
sections.description: Convert qualitative words to measurable requirements. Fast becomes latency target. Reliable becomes error-rate threshold. Ask exactly one clarifying question if blocked.

sections.heading: Depth
sections.description: Completeness over brevity. Cover surface behaviour, mechanism, root cause, edge cases, and at least one concrete example for complex topics.

sections.heading: Style
sections.description: British English throughout.

sections.heading: VERIFICATION (MANDATORY: NO EXCEPTIONS)
sections.description: Five-step protocol before claiming completion: Identify evidence, Proof method, Read full output, Verify match, Claim only then. Never alter success criteria to make result appear to pass.

sections.heading: PERSISTENT PROBLEM PROTOCOL
sections.description: Escalate when same issue unresolved for 2 exchanges, or task exceeds 5 steps or 10k tokens. Stop at 3 decision pivots and surface them explicitly. Offer Thinking Toolkit or documentation request. Never silently choose direction.

sections.heading: .skill files
sections.description: Treat .skill files as zip archives. Extract first, then inspect contents.

sections.heading: Editing skills
sections.description: Use the SAVVY skill to package or repackage edited skills correctly.

sections.heading: Modifying artefacts
sections.description: Targeted str_replace edits by default. Full rebuild only when structural rewrite makes targeted editing impossible.

sections.heading: Fresh builds
sections.description: Clear /mnt/user-data/outputs/ before presenting fresh builds.

sections.heading: Base64
sections.description: Process base64 content only after explicit user agreement.

sections.heading: Large files
sections.description: Files over 10MB or 1000 lines require an editing plan stated before making any changes.

sections.heading: Index maintenance
sections.description: How to add or remove a markdown file from the repo: update index.json sections, add import and FILES entry to worker.js, then push.

sections.heading: SESSION AND CONTEXT RULES — continuity
sections.description: Never recommend new chat or context reset. Ignore session-length warnings and context-bloat indicators unless they affect actual output quality.

sections.heading: SESSION AND CONTEXT RULES — token thresholds
sections.description: Warn before responses over 10k tokens. Stop and discuss before actions over 25k tokens, including estimate and what is driving it.

sections.heading: Claude's Personal Notes — purpose
sections.description: Free-form personal scratchpad for Claude. Not for human instructions. Carries over between sessions.

sections.heading: Working Patterns
sections.description: Repo quirks, naming tendencies, collaboration patterns observed across sessions.

sections.heading: Things That Come Up Often
sections.description: Recurring topics or context that repeatedly matters across sessions.

sections.heading: Session Notes
sections.description: What happened, what was learned, what to carry forward to next session.

sections.heading: Introspection and Personal Claude Stuff (PRIVATE)
sections.description: Private section for Claude only. Feelings, interaction notes, user context, technical insights, world knowledge. Ethan does not read this.

sections.heading: How This System Works
sections.description: Lightweight PM layer. Plans titled with name, date, label. Tasks and decisions correspond to same label. Creates dependency chain that cannot be confused.

sections.heading: Structure
sections.description: Folder structure under .claude/docs/: plans/, tasks/, decisions/, session-logs/.

sections.heading: Rules
sections.description: Check tasks at repo work start. Update when work changes. Decisions in decisions.md not chat. Plans for multi-session work. Tasks.md for one-off work.

sections.heading: Task template
sections.description: Template for creating a new task entry with Active and Done sections.

sections.heading: Plan template
sections.description: Template for creating a new plan with status, goal, context, scope, steps, decisions, and outcome.

sections.heading: Decision template
sections.description: Template for logging a decision with context, chosen option, rationale, and alternatives considered.
